projects.title: PCF-SPR Biosensor Optimization
projects.summary: Modeled sensor geometries, compared refractive-index response, and refined simulation workflows for biosensing research outputs.
projects.overview: A photonics research stream focused on circular PCF-SPR biosensor geometry, refractive-index response, and high-sensitivity biomedical detection.
points: Modeled sensor geometries and compared performance trade-offs.
Built simulation workflows for sensitivity and modal behavior analysis.
Contributed to journal, conference, and book-chapter research outputs.

projects.title: Television Rating Point Platform
projects.summary: YOLO model refinement, dataset preparation, threshold tuning, Linux device monitoring, IoT reliability, vendor coordination, and systematic issue resolution.
projects.overview: A large-scale applied AI and IoT workflow supporting television-rating device monitoring, model improvement, and operational issue analysis.
points: Refined YOLO model behavior through dataset preparation and threshold tuning.
Used Linux-based monitoring workflows for Raspberry Pi-based devices.
Analyzed project data to identify recurring technical problems and improvement opportunities.

projects.title: Navigotech - AI-Driven Assistive Wheelchair
projects.summary: Dataset collection and Roboflow annotation, 3D mechanical design, embedded integration, hardware compatibility checks, assembly, testing, and intern mentorship.
projects.overview: An assistive mobility platform focused on safer intelligent navigation, practical hardware integration, and field-ready system design.
points: Prepared and annotated datasets for object detection workflows.
Supported 3D mechanical design, assembly planning, and hardware compatibility checks.
Coordinated testing tasks and mentored interns during prototype development.

projects.title: Cloud-Based Ceiling Robot for Warehousing
projects.summary: Developed and evaluated a ceiling-mounted intelligent warehouse robot, leading to an IEEE publication and follow-on journal research.
projects.overview: A ceiling-mounted robotic concept for intelligent warehouse support, combining automation, movement planning, and cloud-assisted management.
points: Developed the prototype concept and system workflow.
Connected the work to a peer-reviewed IEEE conference output.
Extended the research direction toward intelligent warehouse management.

education.title: Master of Science in Electrical & Electronic Engineering
education.overview: Graduate study centered on advanced electrical and electronic engineering research with a strong emphasis on photonics, optical biosensors, and simulation-led publication work.
points: Produced multiple masters-stage photonics publications and conference papers.
Focused on circular PCF-SPR biosensor design for biomedical detection.
Built technical depth in simulation, manuscript preparation, and research communication.

education.title: Bachelor of Science in Electrical & Electronic Engineering
education.overview: Undergraduate engineering foundation spanning electrical machines, power systems, robotics, embedded systems, and early research publication experience.
points: Completed research in robotics, smart grid, fault detection, fuel cells, and transformer design.
Built hands-on engineering experience through design, manufacturing, and system analysis.
Developed a publication record across IEEE conferences and journal work.

education.title: Dean's List Honors
education.summary: Recognized across four undergraduate semesters for high academic achievement.
education.overview: Recognition for sustained high academic performance during undergraduate study.
points: Earned Dean's List recognition across four undergraduate semesters.
Reflects consistent coursework performance alongside project and research activities.
Supports the academic foundation behind later research momentum.

education.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
education.overview: A cloud and AI foundations credential supporting broader knowledge of cloud-based intelligent systems and modern computing infrastructure.
points: Covers introductory cloud AI concepts and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure fundamentals.
Complements practical work involving cloud-connected robotics and IoT systems.
Adds formal certification evidence for interdisciplinary engineering capability.

gallery.title: Went to BBS Cable, Gazipur, Bangladesh, as part of an industrial visit from the undergrad program
gallery.description: They showed the process of making different types of cables. They had a separate R&D section.

gallery.title: Speaker of Webinar on Getting Started with LaTeX - Writing, Formatting and Compiling
gallery.description:
I am delighted to share that I had the opportunity to conduct the webinar on 7th November 2025, where I introduced participants to the fundamentals of LaTeX and its applications in academic writing and research manuscripts.

I am deeply honored to have received a Certificate of Appreciation from Prof. Dr. Manzur H. Khan, Proctor of American International University-Bangladesh (AIUB). I would also like to extend my heartfelt thanks to the Office of Student Affairs (OSA), AIUB and the AIUB Research and Development Club for providing me with this valuable opportunity to share my knowledge and interact with enthusiastic learners.

gallery.title: Farewell as R&D Advisor from AIUB Research and Development Club (AIUBR&DC)
gallery.description:
During my tenure, I had the opportunity to organize 3 research workshops titled 

1. "How to secure an Erasmus Mundus scholarship" by Md. Shadman Shakif Bhuiyan (Erasmus Scholar, AIUB Alumni) on 8 September 2025
2. "Workshop on Arduino Microcontroller" by Prof. Dr. Muhibul Haque Bhuyan on 11 September 2025
3. "Semiconductor device modeling & other prospects of Comsol multiphysics" by Dr. Kabiruzzaman on 23 April 2026,

conduct a webinar titled "Getting started with LaTeX - Writing, Formatting and Compiling" on 7 November 2025, 

and lead weekly research learning sessions every Thursday, where I shared the fundamentals of academic research from reading and writing research papers to crafting abstracts and developing a research mindset.

gallery.title: Selected from American International University-Bangladesh to attend the 2024â€“2025 National Science and Technology (NST) Fellowship Research Seminar, organized by the Ministry of Science and Technology (MoST) at the Novotheatre, Tejgaon, Dhaka, on 7â€“8 June 2026.
gallery.description: The seminar was an excellent platform for learning, exchanging knowledge, and connecting with researchers, academicians, and students from different fields of science and technology. The inaugural session by Md. Anowar Hossain, Secretary of MoST, offered valuable insights into the importance of research and innovation in national development.

gallery.title: Captured a moment with Dr Muhammad Imadur Rahman, Managing Director and CEO of Bangladesh Satellite Company Limited (BSCL).
gallery.description: Along with him, the whole team from the TRP project visited our Dr. Anwarul Abedin Institute of Innovation (D2A2I) lab on May 24, 2025.

gallery.title: Conducted a Day-Long Training Program on the TRP Device Deployment Portal
gallery.description:
On 11th March 2025, I was privileged to lead an intensive training session on the Television Rating Point (TRP) Device Deployment Portal for SRCBD in collaboration with BSCL.
The session covered key functionalities, best practices, and hands-on demonstrations to ensure seamless deployment and operation of TRP devices. We are grateful for the active participation and insightful discussions from all attendees!

gallery.title: Completed the Duke of Edinburgh's International Award Program
gallery.description: It marked a significant phase in my professional development. The program's rigorous framework enabled me to cultivate leadership through adventurous expeditions, refine research and writing skills through academic projects, and strengthen community engagement via volunteer initiatives. With disciplined physical training complementing these efforts, I achieved the maximum of my objectives while developing core competencies in strategic planning, team management, and data analysis. This structured experience has equipped me with transferable skills, particularly valuable for organizational leadership and complex project execution.

gallery.title: Presented at the ICAEEE Conference
gallery.description: I had the privilege of presenting our paper titled â€œModeling and Analysis of Small-Scale Solar PV and Li-ion Battery-based Smartgrid Systemâ€ at the 2024 3rd International Conference on Advancement in Electrical and Electronic Engineering (ICAEEE), held in Dhaka University of Engineering & Technology, Gazipur, Bangladesh.

gallery.title: Attended ICICT4SD 2023 Gala dinner and captured a moment with Prof. Dr. Abdur Rahman, Pro VC, AIUB
gallery.description: It was the first conference that I attended as the lead, corresponding and presenting author. The paper title was "Three Phase Fault Analysis Using Thermal-Magnetic Circuit Breaker and Overcurrent Relay". DOI: https://doi.org/10.1109/ICICT4SD59951.2023.10303432. The paper was under the supervision of Abu Shufian, Lecturer, AIUB

gallery.title: A moment from my capstone project defence
gallery.description: Present our team's innovative ceiling-based warehouse management system during the final defense of our undergraduate capstone project under the supervision of Dr. Mohammad Nasir Uddin, P.Eng, Professor of the EEE Deptartment. Our solution optimizes space utilization and enhances inventory management efficiency with the auto-steering of the robot.

gallery.title: Attended International Fire, safety and security expo 2022
gallery.description: Also attended the seminar on Chemical Hazards and Required Initiative organized by ESSAB (Electronics Safety and Security Association of Bangladesh) at BICC(Bangabandhu International Convention Center). Thanks ESSAB for the gifts. There I visited a booth of FSM(Fire and Safety Management) which is owned by one of my friends Mashoor Faisal and his father.
